rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES PITTS SR./CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. PES-07-289918
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Contestant Dana Pitts
rulings.Rulings: MATTER ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, MARCH 21, 2008. Respondents' Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted as Contestant is ordered to respond within 20 days of notice of this order. Respondent's request for sanctions is denied. Late opposition has been considered. The inadequate notice and service of this motion has been waived by that late opposition. = (612/EAH)
